pi_items.source: task.json and setup_libreoffice_base.sh confirm this path is used for the chinook.odb database file
Official Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database): EmployeeId 3 is Jane Peacock with Title 'Sales Support Agent'
Official Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database): EmployeeId 4 is Margaret Park with Title 'Sales Support Agent'
Task description and verifier.py specify USA and Canada as the target countries; verified in Chinook database customer records
Task description requires creating a 'TransferLog' table; this is a custom table, not part of standard Chinook
Official Chinook database query: SELECT CustomerId, Country FROM Customer WHERE SupportRepId = 3 AND Country IN ('USA', 'Canada')
Official Chinook database: Jane Peacock (SupportRepId 3) has 8 customers in USA/Canada (3 Canada, 5 USA)

Official Chinook database query: SELECT CustomerId, Country FROM Customer WHERE SupportRepId = 3 AND Country NOT IN ('USA', 'Canada'). Note: Customer 3 is François Tremblay from Canada (not Brazil); customers 39, 40, 41 are not assigned to Jane Peacock.
Official Chinook database: Jane Peacock has 13 customers NOT in USA/Canada across 8 countries

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database hosted on GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database). The task correctly identifies that EmployeeId 3 is Jane Peacock (Sales Support Agent) and EmployeeId 4 is Margaret Park (Sales Support Agent). The target countries USA and Canada are correct. However, the verifier.py file contains critical errors in its hardcoded customer lists. The actual customers in USA/Canada assigned to Jane Peacock are IDs 3, 15, 18, 19, 24, 29, 30, 33 (8 total), NOT the 22 customer IDs claimed in TARGET_CUSTOMER_IDS. Additionally, Jane Peacock's customers NOT in USA/Canada span 8 countries (Brazil, France, Germany, Finland, Hungary, Ireland, United Kingdom, India) with IDs 1, 12, 37, 38, 42, 43, 44, 45, 46, 52, 53, 58, 59 (13 total), not the simplified 3-country list in PRESERVE_CUSTOMER_IDS. Customer 3 (François Tremblay) is from Canada, not Brazil as the verifier's grouping suggests.
